opportunities.specific_product: Art3d peel-and-stick subway tile backsplash sheets
opportunities.transformation_hook: $28 backsplash makeover in one afternoon, zero tools, zero grout
opportunities.before_state: Blank builder-grade drywall or dingy old tile behind the stove and sink
opportunities.after_state: Bright subway-tile-style backsplash that looks professionally installed
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's Pinterest feed just spotlighted renter-friendly decorating this week, naming peel-and-stick tile and 'temporary kitchen upgrades' by name as the trend to watch.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia acacia wood paper towel holder & counter organizer
opportunities.transformation_hook: $24 organizer turns a cluttered counter into a styled corner
opportunities.before_state: Paper towel roll tipping over, sponge and soap scattered across a messy counter
opportunities.after_state: Single acacia wood stand holding paper towels, soap, and sponge — clean styled counter
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple just reviewed this exact acacia wood counter organizer this week for small-kitchen decluttering, and it maps directly onto our 20%-commission Syruvia kitchen line.

opportunities.specific_product: 6ft sliding barn door hardware kit + door slab
opportunities.transformation_hook: $89 barn door swap turns a boring closet into a design focal point
opportunities.before_state: Plain hollow-core closet or pantry door in a dated hallway
opportunities.after_state: Rustic-modern sliding barn door as a statement wall feature
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's Pinterest is actively pushing barn doors as a trend 'to discover all styles of' this week, riding the same farmhouse-character wave as their viral French chateau renovation content.

opportunities.specific_product: Stackable fabric closet storage bin & organizer set
opportunities.transformation_hook: $34 bin set turns a chaotic kid's closet into a magazine-ready shelf
opportunities.before_state: Overflowing closet with toys and clothes piled with no system
opportunities.after_state: Color-coordinated stacked bins with labeled shelves, fully visible and tidy
opportunities.why_now: Both HGTV (small kid's bedroom ideas) and Apartment Therapy (multi-talented dorm storage picks) published small-space storage roundups this week — decluttering is having its summer moment.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch couch cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: $47 stretch cover turns a pet-hair-covered couch into a like-new sofa in 10 minutes
opportunities.before_state: Worn, stained, pet-hair-covered couch dragging down the whole living room
opportunities.after_state: Crisp, tailored slipcover instantly refreshing the room
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's 'spend your budget wisely, high-impact updates' pin signals a budget-refresh mood this week, and pet-hair/stains is a year-round high-intent search — plus it's our highest-commission tier (24-30%).
